de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class OpReplacer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.OpReplacer

  • public class OpReplacer
extends java.lang.Object
    Replaces operators in a term by other operators with the same signature, or subterms of the term by other terms with the same sort. Does not replace in java blocks.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      OpReplacer(java.util.Map<? extends SVSubstitute,? extends SVSubstitute> map, TermFactory tf)
      Creates an OpReplacer.
      OpReplacer(java.util.Map<? extends SVSubstitute,? extends SVSubstitute> map, TermFactory tf, Proof proof)
      Creates an OpReplacer.

    • Constructor Detail

      • OpReplacer

        public OpReplacer(java.util.Map<? extends SVSubstitute,? extends SVSubstitute> map,
                  TermFactory tf)

        Creates an OpReplacer.

        If there is a proof currently loaded, you may want to use OpReplacer(Map, TermFactory, Proof) as it correctly deals with OriginTermLabels and other proof-dependent features.

        Parameters:
        map - map mapping from the operators/terms to be replaced to the ones to replace them with
        tf - a term factory.

      • OpReplacer

        public OpReplacer(java.util.Map<? extends SVSubstitute,? extends SVSubstitute> map,
                  TermFactory tf,
                  Proof proof)
        Creates an OpReplacer.
        Parameters:
        map - map mapping from the operators/terms to be replaced to the ones to replace them with.
        tf - a term factory.
        proof - the currently loaded proof

    • Method Detail

      • replace

        public static Term replace(Term toReplace,
                           Term with,
                           Term in,
                           TermFactory tf)

        Replace a sub-term.

        If there is a proof currently loaded, you may want to use replace(Operator, Operator, Term, TermFactory, Proof) as it correctly deals with OriginTermLabels and other proof-dependent features.

        Parameters:
        toReplace - the sub-term to replace.
        with - the replacement sub-term.
        in - the term in which to perform the replacement.
        tf - a term factory.
        Returns:
        a term with all occurences of the sub-term replaced.

      • replace

        public static ImmutableList<Term> replace(Term toReplace,
                                          Term with,
                                          ImmutableList<Term> in,
                                          TermFactory tf)

        Replace a sub-term.

        If there is a proof currently loaded, you may want to use replace(Term, Term, ImmutableList, TermFactory, Proof) as it correctly deals with OriginTermLabels and other proof-dependent features.

        Parameters:
        toReplace - the sub-term to replace.
        with - the replacement sub-term.
        in - the terms in which to perform the replacement.
        tf - a term factory.
        Returns:
        the terms with all occurences of the sub-term replaced.

      • replace

        public static Term replace(Operator toReplace,
                           Operator with,
                           Term in,
                           TermFactory tf)

        Replace an operator.

        If there is a proof currently loaded, you may want to use replace(Operator, Operator, Term, TermFactory, Proof) as it correctly deals with OriginTermLabels and other proof-dependent features.

        Parameters:
        toReplace - the operator to replace.
        with - the replacement operator.
        in - the term in which to perform the replacement.
        tf - a term factory.
        Returns:
        a term with all occurences of the operator replaced.

      • replace

        public static Term replace(Term toReplace,
                           Term with,
                           Term in,
                           TermFactory tf,
                           Proof proof)

        Replace a sub-term.

        Parameters:
        toReplace - the sub-term to replace.
        with - the replacement sub-term.
        in - the term in which to perform the replacement.
        tf - a term factory.
        proof - the currently loaded proof.
        Returns:
        a term with all occurences of the sub-term replaced.

      • replace

        public static ImmutableList<Term> replace(Term toReplace,
                                          Term with,
                                          ImmutableList<Term> in,
                                          TermFactory tf,
                                          Proof proof)

        Replace a sub-term.

        Parameters:
        toReplace - the sub-term to replace.
        with - the replacement sub-term.
        in - the terms in which to perform the replacement.
        tf - a term factory.
        proof - the currently loaded proof.
        Returns:
        the terms with all occurences of the sub-term replaced.

      • replace

        public static Term replace(Operator toReplace,
                           Operator with,
                           Term in,
                           TermFactory tf,
                           Proof proof)

        Replace an operator.

        Parameters:
        toReplace - the operator to replace.
        with - the replacement operator.
        in - the term in which to perform the replacement.
        tf - a term factory.
        proof - the currently loaded proof.
        Returns:
        a term with all occurences of the operator replaced.

        Replaces in an operator.
        Parameters:
        op - the operator in which to perform the replacement.
        Returns:
        the replaced operator.

      • replace

        public Term replace(Term term)
        Replaces in a term.
        Parameters:
        term - the term in which to perform the replacement.
        Returns:
        the transformed term.

        public ImmutableList<Term> replace(ImmutableList<Term> terms)

        Returns:

        public java.util.Map<Operator,Term> replace(java.util.Map<Operator,Term> myMap)

      • replace

        public ImmutableArray<QuantifiableVariable> replace(ImmutableArray<QuantifiableVariable> vars)

        Returns:
        the list of transformed variables.
